title: Quantitative Aptitude
description: Arithmetic, percentages, ratios, speed, profit and loss, and mathematical problem-solving concepts.

title: Logical Reasoning
description: Pattern recognition, analytical reasoning, puzzles, sequences, and logical problem-solving.

title: Verbal Ability
description: Grammar, vocabulary, comprehension, sentence correction, and language-based aptitude skills.

title: Data Interpretation
description: Charts, graphs, tables, and analytical data-solving questions requiring numerical interpretation.

title: Computer Science Fundamentals
description: Core CS concepts including operating systems, DBMS, networking, OOP, and basic programming logic.
